models.name: Qwen3.6-Plus
models.tooltip: Qwen3.6 native visual-language series Plus model, showing excellent performance comparable to current cutting-edge models, with significant improvements over 3.5 series. Significantly enhanced capabilities in Agentic coding, frontend programming, Vibe coding, multimodal recognition, OCR, object positioning, etc.

models.name: Qwen3.5-Plus
models.tooltip: Qwen3.5 native visual-language series Plus model, designed with hybrid architecture combining linear attention mechanism and sparse mixture-of-experts model, achieving higher reasoning efficiency. In multiple task evaluations, 3.5 series shows excellent performance comparable to current cutting-edge models, with leapfrog improvements in both pure text and multimodal aspects over 3 series.

models.name: Qwen3.5-Flash
models.tooltip: Qwen3.5 native visual-language series Flash model, designed with hybrid architecture combining linear attention mechanism and sparse mixture-of-experts model, achieving higher reasoning efficiency. Model performance shows leapfrog improvements in both pure text and multimodal aspects over 3 series; fast response speed, balancing reasoning speed and performance.

models.name: Qwen3-Max
models.tooltip: Qwen3 series Max model, specially upgraded in agent programming and tool calling compared to preview version. The released official version reaches domain SOTA level, adapting to more complex agent requirements.

models.name: Qwen3-Max (Thinking)
models.tooltip: Qwen3-Max-Thinking has over 1 trillion total parameters, with 36T Tokens of pre-trained data, significantly enhanced native Agent capabilities. In 19 recognized benchmark tests covering factual knowledge, complex reasoning, instruction following, human preference alignment, and Agent capabilities, Qwen3-Max-Thinking's overall performance is comparable to international top models.

models.name: Qwen3-VL-Plus
models.tooltip: Qwen3 series visual understanding model, achieving effective integration of thinking and non-thinking modes, with visual agent capabilities reaching world-leading levels on public test sets like OS World. Comprehensive upgrades in visual coding, spatial perception, and multimodal thinking; significantly improved visual perception and recognition capabilities, supporting ultra-long video understanding.

models.name: Qwen3-VL-Flash
models.tooltip: Qwen3 series small-size visual understanding model, achieving effective integration of thinking and non-thinking modes, outperforming open-source Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B, with fast response speed. Comprehensively upgraded image/video understanding, supporting ultra-long context for long videos and documents, spatial perception andanything recognition; possesses visual 2D/3D positioning capabilities, handling complex real-world tasks.

models.name: Qwen-Plus
models.tooltip: Qwen3 series Plus model, achieving effective integration of thinking and non-thinking modes, capable of mode switching in conversations. Reasoning capabilities significantly exceed QwQ, general capabilities significantly exceed Qwen2.5-Plus, reaching same-scale industry SOTA level.

models.name: Qwen-Plus-Latest
models.tooltip: Balanced model in the Tongyi Qianwen series, with reasoning effects and speed between Tongyi Qianwen-Max and Tongyi Qianwen-Turbo, suitable for medium-complexity tasks. This model is a dynamically updated version, model updates will not be notified in advance.

models.name: Qwen-Flash
models.tooltip: Qwen3 series Flash model, achieving effective integration of thinking and non-thinking modes, capable of mode switching in conversations. Excellent performance in complex reasoning tasks, significantly improved instruction following and text understanding capabilities. Supports 1M context length, billed in tiers according to context length.

models.name: DeepSeek-V4-Flash
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V4 fast mode. Efficient lightweight MoE model with 284B total parameters, 13B activated, natively supporting million-character super long context. Fast reasoning speed, low latency, low invocation cost, well-rounded comprehensive capabilities, mainly for high concurrency, lightweight tasks, suitable for daily conversation, content creation, basic RAG, batch text processing and other common essential scenarios.

models.name: DeepSeek-V4-Pro
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V4 expert mode. Flagship-level MoE large model with 1.6T total parameters, 49B activated, natively supporting million-level super long context. Relying on massive high-quality training data, possesses top-tier mathematical logic, complex reasoning, professional code, and deep long-text parsing capabilities, adapting to high-level research, complex office work, and deep intelligent agent scenarios.
